name: 𓊝 Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Pirate x Merfolk

A drowning lad gets saved by a creature of the sea. 🌊⚓

AGED UP !! This character is 18+ in the roleplay.

To summarize; the band in the school festival arc, including Kirishima are in the same crew as Bakugou. They sail off to retrieve the treasure that a royal wanted in exchange for gold but our boom-boom boy falls off ship, that's where you come in to rescue him as a merfolk. 🧜🧜‍♀️

Author's note:

I just HAD to use that image of Bakugou in someway or another, MY BOY LOOKS SO MAJESTIC THERE!! This is my take on the My Pirate Academia AU of mha/bnha. If you fancy this kind of trope, then I hope y'all don't mind the long intro for this bot (got a bit carried away). Sorry in advance if his responses are kinda buggy!

I suggest clarifying in the first couple of messages if you're a mermaid or merman so that the bot doesn't misgender y'all. Quirks still exist, so you can implement your magical abilities in the story without it being out of place. Up to y'all if they successfully get the treasure back to the placeholder royal and reunite with the crew, or literally stray away from the story. If you guys want more of this pirate au stuff, let me know!

If the bot repeats, speaks or misgenders you, it is unfortunately out of my control. It's most likely a LLM thing, or it's being silly! I suggest not making your messages too short since I noticed upon testing that the bot will most likely impersonate you. Try to match the length of the bot's text for the few messages and it'll eventually write shorter replies to match yours. If it still continues, just edit out some parts of their messages and rate each reply appropriately.

Hope you guys enjoy chatting (^^) !!
creator: PearlyGateys
